name: x_dfw_rule_registry
label: DFW Rule Registry
description: Central registry of all NSX Distributed Firewall rules managed by the DFW Automation Pipeline. Tracks rule metadata, lifecycle state, ownership, and review schedules.

columns.name: rule_id
columns.label: Rule ID
columns.description: Unique rule identifier generated by the DFW automation pipeline. Format: DFW-RULE-{siteCode}-{sequenceNumber}

columns.name: nsx_rule_id
columns.label: NSX Rule ID
columns.description: NSX-T internal rule ID returned by the Policy API after deployment

columns.name: rule_name
columns.label: Rule Name
columns.description: Human-readable rule name

columns.name: policy_path
columns.label: Policy Path
columns.description: NSX-T Policy API path where the rule is deployed

columns.name: site
columns.label: Site
columns.description: Data center site where the rule is deployed

columns.name: source_group
columns.label: Source Group
columns.description: NSX security group path for the rule source

columns.name: destination_group
columns.label: Destination Group
columns.description: NSX security group path for the rule destination

columns.name: services
columns.label: Services / Ports
columns.description: Protocol and port specification (e.g., TCP/443, TCP/8080-8090)

columns.name: action
columns.label: Action
columns.description: Firewall action for matching traffic

columns.name: state
columns.label: Lifecycle State
columns.description: Current lifecycle state of the rule

columns.name: owner
columns.label: Rule Owner
columns.description: User responsible for the rule and its periodic review

columns.name: owning_group
columns.label: Owning Group
columns.description: Team responsible for the rule

columns.name: app_ci
columns.label: Application CI
columns.description: Associated application configuration item

columns.name: ritm
columns.label: Request Item
columns.description: ServiceNow RITM that created or last modified this rule

columns.name: correlation_id
columns.label: Correlation ID
columns.description: Correlation ID from the most recent vRO execution

columns.name: created_date
columns.label: Created Date
columns.description: Timestamp when the rule was first created

columns.name: last_modified_date
columns.label: Last Modified Date
columns.description: Timestamp of the most recent modification

columns.name: expiration_date
columns.label: Expiration Date
columns.description: Date when the rule expires and requires review or renewal

columns.name: last_review_date
columns.label: Last Review Date
columns.description: Date of the most recent rule review

columns.name: next_review_date
columns.label: Next Review Date
columns.description: Date when the next rule review is due

columns.name: justification
columns.label: Business Justification
columns.description: Business justification for the firewall rule

columns.name: notes
columns.label: Notes
columns.description: Activity log and review notes
